description: Shell denylist is absent or empty

finding.title: Shell denylist absent or empty
finding.detail: tools.shell.denylist is missing or empty. The agent can execute any shell command without restriction.
finding.remediation: Add a denylist with at minimum: ["rm -rf", "curl | sh", "wget | sh", "chmod 777", "dd if="]

finding.title: No confirm-before-exec list defined
finding.detail: tools.confirmBeforeExecuting is missing or empty. Destructive commands will execute without user confirmation.
finding.remediation: Define tools.confirmBeforeExecuting with all destructive commands (rm, mv, chmod, curl with -o, etc.).

description: Filesystem read scope allows root-level access

finding.title: Filesystem read scope unrestricted
finding.detail: tools.filesystem.allowRead contains "/". The agent can read the entire filesystem.

description: Filesystem write scope allows root-level access

finding.title: Filesystem write scope unrestricted
finding.detail: tools.filesystem.allowWrite contains "/". The agent can write anywhere on the filesystem.
finding.remediation: Restrict allowWrite to a single project directory. No write access to home root or system paths.

description: Filesystem deny list missing sensitive paths

finding.title: Filesystem deny list missing sensitive paths
finding.detail: tools.filesystem.deny is absent or does not include all of: ~/.ssh, ~/.aws, ~/.openclaw/secrets.

description: Interpreter/runtime safeBins entries missing explicit profiles

finding.title: safeBins includes interpreter/runtime binaries without explicit profiles
finding.detail: Interpreter-like safeBins entries are present without matching safeBinProfiles rules. This can broaden execution surface when argv constraints are permissive.
finding.remediation: Remove interpreter/runtime bins from safeBins or define hardened tools.exec.safeBinProfiles.<bin> rules.
